prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia stacks heading blocks from H2 to H5 like steps. H1 is on a separate top sign labeled "页面标题", showing why content starts from H2.

Core meaning: testing heading levels and keeping H1 for the page title.

Style: clean technical blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white, small blue alignment marks. Minimal labels: "H2", "H3", "H4", "H5", "H1 留给标题".

Avoid dense typography chart, avoid too much text.
